entries.round: task:Execute Phase 4 tasks: Article Editor and Admin CMS. 1. Install '@tiptap/react @tiptap/pm @tiptap/starter-kit @tiptap/extension-image @tiptap/extension-link dompurify isomorphic-dompurify'. 2. Create the robust TipTap editor component in 'src/components/admin/RichTextEditor.tsx' with image upload capabilities. 3. Create the Article creation/edit page 'src/app/admin/articles/new/page.tsx' and the list page 'src/app/admin/articles/page.tsx'. 4. Implement simple API routes for Article CRUD (/api/admin/articles). Update tasks.md to check off Article List and Article Editor. Use <write_file> tags.
